summary: SSO (Single Sign-On) integration testing COMPLETE. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend SSO callback page, normal login, QR login all working correctly. mactech.tr API is not ready (returns 503), but code structure, routing, and error handling are properly implemented.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/sso-login without sso_token returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/sso-login with empty sso_token returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/sso-login with invalid token returns 503 (mactech.tr not reachable)
Backend: POST /api/auth/sso-login endpoint exists (not 404)
Backend: POST /api/auth/register still works (SSO didn't break existing auth)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials works
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/qr/generate creates QR session
Backend: GET /api/auth/qr/status/{session_id} returns pending status
Backend: GET /api/auth/qr/status/{invalid_id} returns 404
Frontend: Login page loads with email, password inputs and submit button
Frontend: QR Login button visible ('QR Kod ile Giriş Yap')
Frontend: Toggle between login and register mode works
Frontend: Register mode shows company name and phone fields
Frontend: SSO Callback page (/sso-callback) loads correctly
Frontend: SSO Callback shows 'Giriş Başarısız' when no token provided
Frontend: SSO Callback shows error message for invalid token (503 from mactech.tr)
Frontend: 'Normal Giriş Yap' and 'Ana Siteye Dön' buttons visible on SSO error page
Frontend: QR code displayed when QR login mode activated
Frontend: QR login instructions visible ('Nasıl çalışır?')
Frontend: Full registration flow works (register → verify → dashboard)
Frontend: Login with registered user works (logout → login → dashboard)
critical_code_review_comments: SSO endpoint correctly validates sso_token presence (400 if missing/empty)
SSO endpoint properly handles mactech.tr connection errors (503 with descriptive message)
SSOCallbackPage.jsx correctly extracts sso_token from URL query params using useSearchParams
SSO error page provides clear user options: 'Ana Siteye Dön' and 'Normal Giriş Yap'
React Router correctly routes /sso-callback to SSOCallbackPage component
Normal login and QR login functionality preserved after SSO integration
api.js correctly implements ssoLogin function calling /api/auth/sso-login
seed_data_creation: Test user created during registration flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSO integration is complete. The /sso-callback route works and properly handles: (1) missing token - shows 'SSO token bulunamadı' error, (2) invalid token - shows connection error from mactech.tr (503). The mactech.tr/api/platform/sso/verify API is NOT READY yet, so real SSO token verification cannot be tested. When mactech.tr API becomes available, the SSO flow should work: user redirected from mactech.tr with ?sso_token=xxx → SSOCallbackPage extracts token → calls POST /api/auth/sso-login → backend verifies with mactech.tr → returns JWT → user logged in.

mocked_apis.mactech.tr SSO verify: NOT MOCKED - Real API call attempted but mactech.tr is not reachable (returns 503). This is expected as per the requirement that mactech.tr API is not ready yet.

sso_backend_endpoint.error_handling: 503 if mactech.tr unreachable, 401 if token invalid
